title: Hope and Faith
description: Exploring personal growth and community support.
lyrics: All we are is hope and faith Tonight, the night, every which way We learn to bright up our game, warm up the sun And how to be there for the people to Build upon, not destroy It's not like I'm hurting people It's all for the game Good kindness, are we here for that? Or is it more of a business plan, you know? Bouncing, we need more bouncing As we bounce again All we are, yeah, all we are Is hope and faith With the faith that you'll do the right thing tomorrow And I'll do the right thing tomorrow With hope, faith, yeah That's how it's made, yeah All we are is hope and faith And just a little bit, I'll take a step All we are is hope and faith Hope and faith, yeah, hope and faith I invite you into my space I invite you into my life It's hope and faith And we gotta hope and faith, yeah And I get a little faith, yeah Even though we're human And that's all we do In the dark and I'll go But you gotta have your time And faith, we have it right And now we're up in fire And all we need is to have your back We got it, we're built in each other Just talk outside, you say you won't pass But I'll be there with the first ones in Maybe soon, maybe another day But I'll see that you get to be blessed with it We've grown, yeah All we've been for the past two dozen years Cause hope is hope, yeah It's hope and faith, hope and faith All we are is hope and faith Hope and faith And you and me and you and me and you and me And you and me and you and me and science Do it all with me and opening my wisest perspective You can come with me and show me a pattern Cause all we are is hope and faith Off-key Remember like, living on a prayer and shit? You know what I'm sayin'? Oh, we're halfway there Oh Just like that
